name: AI / ML / GenAI
description: Breaking down AI, ML & GenAI — no jargon, just intuition

editions.title: AI vs ML vs DL: What's the Difference?
editions.hook: Everyone uses these terms interchangeably. They shouldn't.

editions.title: The ABCs of Machine Learning
editions.hook: Metrics, train/test splits, linear models, and feature engineering — the nuts and bolts.

editions.title: The Confusion Matrix: When 95% Accuracy Means Nothing
editions.hook: A fraud detector with 99% accuracy that catches zero frauds. How?

editions.title: Gradient Descent & Partial Derivatives
editions.hook: Brute force takes longer than the age of the universe. Calculus takes seconds.

editions.title: From Linear Models to Neural Networks
editions.hook: A linear model is just one neuron. Stack hundreds — now you have a brain.

editions.title: Training a Neural Network: Backpropagation
editions.hook: Gradient descent for one layer was easy. For 50 layers? That's backprop.

editions.title: Neural Network Architecture Decisions
editions.hook: How many layers? How many neurons? Here's how to think about it.

editions.title: Overfitting in Deep Learning
editions.hook: Your neural net memorized 50,000 images perfectly. It still can't recognize a cat.

editions.title: CNNs: How Machines See Images
editions.hook: An image is just a matrix of numbers. A CNN finds patterns — edges, shapes, faces.

editions.title: CNN Architectures: LeNet to ResNet
editions.hook: In 2012, a CNN beat humans at image recognition. Here's what changed.

editions.title: Transfer Learning & Practical CV
editions.hook: Why train from scratch when someone already trained on 14 million images?

editions.title: Classic NLP: Bag of Words & TF-IDF
editions.hook: Before ChatGPT, machines counted words. Literally.

editions.title: Word Embeddings: Meaning as Numbers
editions.hook: king - man + woman = queen. That equation works because of embeddings.

editions.title: RNNs & LSTMs: When Order Matters
editions.hook: 'Dog bites man' vs 'man bites dog' — same words, opposite meaning.

editions.title: The Attention Mechanism
editions.hook: Instead of compressing a sentence into one vector, let the model look back.

editions.title: Transformers: The Architecture Behind Everything
editions.hook: RNNs process words one by one. Transformers process ALL simultaneously.

editions.title: Tokenization Deep Dive: BPE & Tiktoken
editions.hook: GPT doesn't read words. It reads chunks. 'unfortunately' = 'un' + 'fortunate' + 'ly'.

editions.title: How LLMs Are Trained: Pretraining & Scaling
editions.hook: GPT-4 read the entire internet. Here's what 'training' means at that scale.

editions.title: RLHF: How ChatGPT Became Helpful
editions.hook: Raw GPT is a text predictor. RLHF turned it into an assistant.

editions.title: Prompt Engineering
editions.hook: The difference between a useless answer and a brilliant one? How you asked.

editions.title: Function Calling & Structured Outputs
editions.hook: LLMs can't browse the web alone. Function calling gives them tools.

editions.title: Embeddings for Search & RAG
editions.hook: How does ChatGPT 'know' your uploaded PDF? It doesn't. It searches it.

editions.title: RAG: Retrieval Augmented Generation
editions.hook: LLMs hallucinate. RAG forces them to answer from YOUR data.

editions.title: Evaluating GenAI Applications
editions.hook: Your chatbot answers questions. But is it answering CORRECTLY?

editions.title: Fine-Tuning LLMs: LoRA & QLoRA
editions.hook: OpenAI's model is generic. YOUR model should know YOUR domain.

editions.title: Distillation & Quantization
editions.hook: GPT-4 costs $0.03 per query. A distilled model costs $0.0001.

editions.title: AI Agents: LLMs That Take Actions
editions.hook: A chatbot answers questions. An agent books your flight and sends the email.

editions.title: MCP & Advanced LLM Patterns
editions.hook: Model Context Protocol: the USB-C of AI — one standard to connect LLMs to anything.

editions.title: Deploying GenAI: FastAPI + Docker
editions.hook: Your Jupyter notebook doesn't serve 1000 users. Here's how to actually deploy.

editions.title: LLM System Design
editions.hook: Interviewer: 'Design a support chatbot for a bank.' Here's how to answer.

editions.title: The GenAI Engineer Toolkit
editions.hook: LangChain, LlamaIndex, vector DBs — the stack that gets you hired.

editions.title: GenAI in Finance
editions.hook: Document processing, risk models, robo-advisors — the real use cases.
